_meta.purpose: Seed application_types lookup table. Drives the Application filter on Products + the site-survey area-type picker.

rows.name: Column Protection
rows.description: Protect structural + racking columns from side impacts and abrasion.

rows.name: Rack Protection
rows.description: Rack-end and upright protection for pallet racking systems.

rows.name: Pedestrian Walkways
rows.description: Segregate pedestrian routes from vehicle traffic.

rows.name: Traffic Management
rows.description: Guide and contain forklift and vehicle traffic inside operational zones.

rows.name: Dock Protection
rows.description: Loading bay walls, dock buffers, truck stops and reversing protection.

rows.name: Perimeter Protection
rows.description: Protect site perimeters + equipment lines from vehicle impact.

rows.name: Corner Protection
rows.description: External / internal wall corners and equipment edges.

rows.name: Height Restriction
rows.description: Mezzanine entries, low-clearance zones and overhead asset protection.

rows.name: Cold Storage
rows.description: Cold-rated barriers + bollards for freezers and chilled warehouses.

rows.name: Equipment Guarding
rows.description: Machinery, processing equipment and electrical DB protection.

rows.name: Vehicle Stops
rows.description: Truck, coach and car wheel stops at parking bays + service lanes.

rows.name: Gate & Access Control
rows.description: Swing gates, traffic gates and retractable belt barriers at controlled entries.
